org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin.CoverageParser

Packages that use CoverageParser
Package
Description
org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin
Provides the main Maven plugin classes.
org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin.parser
Provides parsers for various coverage report formats.
org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin.util
Provides utilities for the plugin.
